vocab.meaning: sự tự do không bị ràng buộc/giới hạn
vocab.example: Back then, we enjoyed unfettered freedom to roam the neighborhood until the streetlights came on.

vocab.meaning: băng qua các loại địa hình
vocab.example: As kids, we loved to traverse the rugged terrain behind our house, pretending we were explorers.

vocab.meaning: khu ngoại ô nhiều cây xanh
vocab.example: I grew up in a leafy suburb where every street was lined with ancient oaks, making walks incredibly pleasant.

vocab.meaning: người thích đi bộ, người hay đi bộ
vocab.example: I wouldn't say I was an avid walker by choice, but my parents insisted on daily family outings to get some fresh air.
We would often stumble upon hidden brooks or patches of wildflowers while wandering off the beaten track.

vocab.meaning: thong thả dành thời gian, giết thời gian
vocab.example: We used to idle away the hours by walking down to the local pier to watch the fishermen.
The area was surrounded by lush greenery, which provided a perfect backdrop for our childhood adventures.
Walking through the pine forest was a total sensory experience, from the smell of the needles to the crunching sound under my boots.

vocab.meaning: ở nơi hẻo lánh, ít người qua lại
vocab.example: My friends and I always preferred to go off the beaten track rather than sticking to the paved sidewalks.
Thinking back to those evening strolls with my dog, my memories are deeply imbued with nostalgia.
